full_text:
Sun Song
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sun Songwas born in Wu. He allowed his men to become lax, so Lu Xun shaved their heads in front of Song. Sun Song was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
